usage: Prompt Room 应优先作为 SC008-SH003 图生视频首帧/参考帧；原 SC008 reference frame 保留用于 SC008-SH001/SH002 的封锁线与空间气氛。

assets.prompt_summary: Use SC008-SH003 井沿月白反光可读性覆盖帧 as episode 01 shot override. Macro low-angle old well rim close-up, Qingming incense smoke touching damp mossy stone, one narrow moon-white glint line readable on the inner rim. Preserve RULE_MOON_WHITE_GLINT_ONLY;RULE_NO_YAN_NANZHI_REVEAL;RULE_NO_MOON_JADE_FULL_REVEAL;PROP_QINGMING_INCENSE;LOC_OLD_WELL. No people, no hand, no full jade, no readable generated text, no UI, no watermark, no high-magic beam.
assets.qc_note: 新增 SC008-SH003 井沿可读性覆盖帧，月白反光清楚且未揭示井下人物、手或完整玉片。
